description.en: Basic features such as time zone and calendar information, weather and astronomical data
description.zh: 基本功能，如时区和日历信息、天气和天文数据

weaknesses.en: Limited to basic features without any paid tiers for advanced services
weaknesses.zh: 仅限于基本功能，没有高级服务的付费套餐

targetAudience.en: General public and businesses needing time zone and calendar information, weather and astronomical data
targetAudience.zh: 需要时区和日历信息、天气和天文数据的一般公众和企业

positioning.en: A comprehensive resource for time zone, calendar, weather, and astronomical information
positioning.zh: 提供时区、日历、天气和天文信息的综合资源
